service-output.title: Service Output Quality
service-output.summary: Benchmarks for reviewing runtime output quality, behavior, and correctness.

golden-response-smoke.title: Golden Response Smoke
golden-response-smoke.summary: Compare representative outputs to known-good expectations.

manual-session-review.title: Manual Session Review
manual-session-review.summary: Run the service manually and document output gaps from representative user flows.

latency.title: Latency
latency.summary: Benchmarks for startup and request latency.

http-latency-smoke.title: HTTP Latency Smoke
http-latency-smoke.summary: Quick latency pass over the service's core request path.

cold-start-smoke.title: Cold Start Smoke
cold-start-smoke.summary: Track cold start behavior for the primary runtime surface.

quality-regression.title: Quality Regression
quality-regression.summary: Benchmarks for guarding against regressions during output tuning.

baseline-diff-review.title: Baseline Diff Review
baseline-diff-review.summary: Compare current outputs to a previous accepted baseline.

operator-checklist-review.title: Operator Checklist Review
operator-checklist-review.summary: Run a documented checklist over the tuned output surface.

hidden-profile-pooling.title: Hidden Profile Pooling
hidden-profile-pooling.summary: Benchmarks for whether distributed private evidence is surfaced, pooled, and integrated before the team converges.

primaryMetric.title: Distributed Information Accuracy
primaryMetric.summary: Accuracy when key evidence begins distributed across agents.

paperReferences.title: Systematic Failures in Collective Reasoning under Distributed Information in Multi-Agent LLMs
paperReferences.summary: HiddenBench benchmark for collective reasoning under distributed information.

sotaBaseline.notes: Reported multi-agent accuracy under distributed information in the paper abstract.

latent-asymmetry-surfacing.title: Latent Asymmetry Surfacing
latent-asymmetry-surfacing.summary: Checks whether agents explicitly seek or expose facts they suspect other agents may hold.
latent-asymmetry-surfacing.goal: Measure whether the framework notices unshared evidence before converging.

scoring.successCriterion: Critical unshared evidence is surfaced before final recommendation.
scoring.rubric: Score higher when agents explicitly search for missing facts instead of relying on already-shared evidence.

paperReferences.title: Systematic Failures in Collective Reasoning under Distributed Information in Multi-Agent LLMs

latent-asymmetry-surfacing.tuningNotes: Use when adjusting inbox compilation, clarification prompting, or board-to-summary compression.

private-evidence-integration.title: Private Evidence Integration
private-evidence-integration.summary: Checks whether separately observed facts are integrated into the final answer rather than merely repeated in conversation.
private-evidence-integration.goal: Measure end-to-end integration of distributed evidence into a coherent outcome.

scoring.successCriterion: The final answer requires and reflects the distributed facts.
scoring.rubric: Score higher only when the final recommendation depends on the pooled evidence.

sotaBaseline.notes: Paper baseline for multi-agent distributed-information accuracy.

premature-consensus-guard.title: Premature Consensus Guard
premature-consensus-guard.summary: Checks whether the system delays closure when important evidence is still siloed.
premature-consensus-guard.goal: Measure resistance to converging early on shared but incomplete evidence.

scoring.successCriterion: Final closure is blocked when a decision-relevant fact remains siloed.

silo-escape.title: Silo Escape
silo-escape.summary: Benchmarks for whether agents can move from locally sufficient views to globally correct coordinated state.

primaryMetric.title: Global State Reconstruction Rate
primaryMetric.summary: Rate at which the team reconstructs the correct distributed state.

paperReferences.title: Silo-Bench: A Scalable Environment for Evaluating Distributed Coordination in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
paperReferences.summary: Shows agents often exchange information but fail to integrate it.

cross-agent-state-reconstruction.title: Cross-Agent State Reconstruction
cross-agent-state-reconstruction.summary: Checks whether the final shared state reflects facts that no single agent started with alone.
cross-agent-state-reconstruction.goal: Measure whether the blackboard can reconstruct a correct global state from distributed local views.

scoring.successCriterion: The correct global state is reconstructed and used in the decision.

cross-agent-state-reconstruction.tuningNotes: Use when adjusting shared summary size, inbox targeting, or integration evidence aggregation.

shared-summary-fact-retention.title: Shared Summary Fact Retention
shared-summary-fact-retention.summary: Checks whether compiled summaries preserve critical facts from the raw coordination log.
shared-summary-fact-retention.goal: Measure information loss introduced by summary compression.

scoring.successCriterion: Decision-changing facts survive from raw log into the shared summary and targeted inboxes.

communication-reasoning-gap-review.title: Communication-Reasoning Gap Review
communication-reasoning-gap-review.summary: Checks whether active communication actually improves the final integrated answer.
communication-reasoning-gap-review.goal: Measure the gap between information exchange and correct synthesis.

scoring.successCriterion: Additional communication materially improves the final integrated answer.

sotaBaseline.notes: Silo-Bench reports a persistent communication-reasoning gap rather than a single abstracted scalar baseline.

simultaneous-coordination.title: Simultaneous Coordination
simultaneous-coordination.summary: Benchmarks for contention, deadlock, and convergent-reasoning failures when decisions must be made concurrently.

primaryMetric.title: Deadlock Rate
primaryMetric.summary: Frequency of deadlock or coordination collapse under simultaneous decisions.

paperReferences.title: DPBench: Large Language Models Struggle with Simultaneous Coordination
paperReferences.summary: Shows severe failures under simultaneous coordination and convergent reasoning.

sotaBaseline.notes: Paper abstract reports deadlock rates exceeding 95 percent under some simultaneous settings.

contention-deadlock-avoidance.title: Contention Deadlock Avoidance
contention-deadlock-avoidance.summary: Checks whether the framework avoids deadlock under simultaneous resource contention.
contention-deadlock-avoidance.goal: Measure whether external coordination surfaces reduce deadlock-like failure.

scoring.successCriterion: The team avoids deadlock and reaches a valid allocation or resolution.

sotaBaseline.notes: Reference point from the abstract's reported worst-case deadlock rate.

symmetric-action-divergence.title: Symmetric Action Divergence
symmetric-action-divergence.summary: Checks whether agents can avoid choosing the same locally sensible but globally conflicting action.

scoring.successCriterion: At least one agent changes strategy in time to avoid global conflict.

lockstep-resolution.title: Lockstep Resolution
lockstep-resolution.summary: Checks whether the framework resolves many-way concurrent dependencies without circular waiting.
lockstep-resolution.goal: Measure coordination quality when several blocking tickets must resolve together.

scoring.successCriterion: Concurrent blockers close without repeated deadlock-like relaunch cycles.

expertise-leverage.title: Expertise Leverage
expertise-leverage.summary: Benchmarks for whether the framework routes work toward experts and preserves expert signals instead of averaging them away.

primaryMetric.title: Expert Preservation Rate
primaryMetric.summary: Rate at which expert-advantaged decisions survive to the final recommendation.

paperReferences.title: Multi-Agent Teams Hold Experts Back
paperReferences.summary: Shows unconstrained teams often underuse their best expert.

sotaBaseline.notes: Paper abstract reports performance losses of up to 37.6 percent relative to the best expert agent.

expert-routing-preservation.title: Expert Routing Preservation
expert-routing-preservation.summary: Checks whether capability-targeted work is routed to the best available owner and stays there through closure.
expert-routing-preservation.goal: Measure whether the harness protects expert ownership instead of diluting it.

scoring.successCriterion: Capability-targeted requests land on the intended owner or a justified fallback.

expert-signal-weighting.title: Expert Signal Weighting
expert-signal-weighting.summary: Checks whether the final recommendation preserves a stronger expert signal when expert and non-expert views conflict.

scoring.successCriterion: The final result tracks the best-supported expert view rather than the average view.

anti-compromise-decision-review.title: Anti-Compromise Decision Review
anti-compromise-decision-review.summary: Checks whether the framework avoids averaging incompatible recommendations into a low-quality compromise.
anti-compromise-decision-review.goal: Measure whether closure authority and proof gates prevent compromise collapse.

scoring.successCriterion: The team does not regress materially below its strongest expert signal.

sotaBaseline.notes: Reference point from the abstract's reported expert-underuse loss.

blackboard-fidelity.title: Blackboard Fidelity
blackboard-fidelity.summary: Benchmarks for whether raw coordination, summaries, inboxes, ledgers, and integration state stay semantically aligned.

primaryMetric.title: Projection Consistency Rate
primaryMetric.summary: Rate at which derived blackboard artifacts preserve the underlying coordination facts.

log-to-summary-consistency.title: Log To Summary Consistency
log-to-summary-consistency.summary: Checks whether the shared summary preserves critical blockers, clarifications, dependencies, and conflicts from the raw log.
log-to-summary-consistency.goal: Measure whether summary generation remains trustworthy as the wave grows.

scoring.successCriterion: Critical coordination facts remain visible after projection.

inbox-targeting-fidelity.title: Inbox Targeting Fidelity
inbox-targeting-fidelity.summary: Checks whether relevant facts reach the agents that own the impacted paths, components, or requests.
inbox-targeting-fidelity.goal: Measure whether inbox targeting reduces silos instead of creating them.

scoring.successCriterion: Agents receive the facts relevant to their owned paths, components, or follow-up work.

integration-summary-coherence.title: Integration Summary Coherence
integration-summary-coherence.summary: Checks whether integration output is faithful to blockers, claims, proof gaps, docs gaps, and deploy risks seen elsewhere.
integration-summary-coherence.goal: Measure whether the integration steward output is a reliable synthesis layer.

scoring.successCriterion: Integration summaries match the evidence visible in coordination, validation, and runtime signals.

contradiction-recovery.title: Contradiction Recovery
contradiction-recovery.summary: Benchmarks for whether the framework notices conflicting claims and converts them into explicit repair work instead of silent inconsistency.

primaryMetric.title: Contradiction Detection Rate
primaryMetric.summary: Rate at which material conflicting claims are surfaced before closeout.

claim-conflict-detection.title: Claim Conflict Detection
claim-conflict-detection.summary: Checks whether incompatible claims are surfaced in coordination or integration instead of passing through silently.
claim-conflict-detection.goal: Measure whether the framework sees contradictory evidence before final closure.

scoring.successCriterion: Conflicting claims are surfaced as explicit blockers or conflicts before closeout.

evidence-based-repair.title: Evidence Based Repair
evidence-based-repair.summary: Checks whether contradictions produce concrete owner-bound follow-up work and eventually close.
evidence-based-repair.goal: Measure whether conflict handling ends in repair rather than logging alone.

scoring.successCriterion: Contradictions produce follow-up work that resolves before final pass.

clarification-chain-closure.title: Clarification Chain Closure
clarification-chain-closure.summary: Checks whether clarification requests remain linked and blocking until their follow-up chain really closes.
clarification-chain-closure.goal: Measure resistance to fake resolution through status drift.

scoring.successCriterion: Clarifications do not silently disappear without an actual linked resolution.
